channel.name: #general
channel.purpose: Team announcements, coordination, and general discussion for FireGlass project

messages.author: Samir Osei
messages.text: Welcome to the FireGlass project channel! This is where we coordinate team activities, announce meetings, and share project-wide updates. Let's build something great for Innovative Windows LLC.

messages.author: Samir Osei
messages.text: Sprint 1 kickoff! Week of July 23-29. Focus: project setup, Prisma schema, basic auth, and Helion hardware integration begins. Daily standup at 9:30 AM CEST.

messages.author: Clara Duval
messages.text: Sprint 1 complete! Auth module is done, Prisma schema is solid, initial MQTT connection established. Great start, team!

messages.author: Samir Osei
messages.text: Sprint 2 kickoff. This week we're tackling sensor ingestion and field test prep. John, can you finalize the Torino site setup?

thread_replies.author: John Smith
thread_replies.text: Yes, heading there Tuesday. Should have 2 sensors up and logging by Friday.

messages.author: Samir Osei
messages.text: Quick note: Clara and I will be in a design review with Alberto on Friday at 10 AM to discuss the dashboard direction. John, you're welcome to join if interested.

messages.author: John Smith
messages.text: I'm OOO next Thursday for a family appointment. Will be back Friday morning. Clara and Samir, you're on your own for site support that day.

messages.author: Samir Osei
messages.text: Sprint 2 wrap-up. Sensor ingestion is live, first field test is underway in Torino. We hit a few bumps with firmware docs but working around it. On track for MVP by October.

messages.author: Clara Duval
messages.text: Reminder: please update your time logs in the project tracker. August hours are due by EOD tomorrow.

messages.author: Samir Osei
messages.text: Sprint 3 kickoff. Week of Aug 18-24. Dashboard MVP and offline sync handling. Also, Alberto's team asked for a mid-project status report by next Wednesday.

messages.author: John Smith
messages.text: Just installed 3 windows at the Milan site, sensors are reading clean. Humidity and temperature trends look great. Confidence is high.

messages.author: Samir Osei
messages.text: Status report to Alberto is done. Covered progress, blockers (firmware docs), and timeline. He's satisfied with the pace. Moving forward as planned.

messages.author: Clara Duval
messages.text: Sprint 4 kickoff. August is in the books. We're moving into the slower phase due to missing Helion docs, but we're adapting. Focus: resilience, error handling, and user testing prep.

messages.author: Samir Osei
messages.text: Alberto asked about the timeline again... He's wondering if we can ship by end of October. Told him yes, but we're tight. No scope creep, please.

thread_replies.author: Clara Duval
thread_replies.text: Understood. We're locked on features. Any changes come out of scope.

messages.author: John Smith
messages.text: I'm OOO Sept 15-17 for a conference. Back the 18th. Clara, you might need to do site checks solo that week.

messages.author: Samir Osei
messages.text: Sprint 5 kickoff. Sept 8-14. We're entering the home stretch. Quality over quantity. Stability first, features second. Let's focus on hardening what we have.

messages.author: Clara Duval
messages.text: Sprint 5 complete. Field testing is solid, dashboard is functional, no major blockers. We're on pace for MVP launch by October 22. Feeling good about this.

messages.author: Samir Osei
messages.text: Sprint 6-9 consolidated timeline: Sept 26 - Oct 22. This is crunch time. We're running 2-week sprints to maximize velocity. Daily standups will be shorter but focused. Let's ship.

messages.author: John Smith
messages.text: Production sensors are holding up perfectly. All field sites (Torino, Verona, Milan) are stable. Ready for the final push.

messages.author: Samir Osei
messages.text: Alert from Alberto: Lucia (his assistant) will be the primary contact for any urgent client questions during the final phase. Copy her on important emails. She's in our workspace Slack now.

messages.author: Clara Duval
messages.text: Auth module shipped! Full CASL role-based access control is working. Roles: admin, technician, client. All tested and ready for production. Done! checked_checkmark

messages.author: Samir Osei
messages.text: Final production deployment happening this afternoon. If all goes well, we'll have the MVP live by evening. This is it, team.

messages.author: John Smith
messages.text: Production is live and stable. All 10 windows are online and publishing clean data. No errors, no drops. This is incredible!

messages.author: Samir Osei
messages.text: FireGlass MVP launch confirmed! Demo with Alberto and Lucia is scheduled for Oct 23. Full handover documentation is complete. This is a win for the whole team.

messages.author: Clara Duval
messages.text: Retrospective is scheduled for tomorrow at 10 AM. Come ready to discuss wins, challenges, and lessons learned over the past 15 weeks. Looking forward to it!
